question: State aur village ke hisaab se healthcare availability ka breakdown do, jo average monthly per capita consumption aur total non-food expenditure dikhaye.
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T1.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), SUM(T1.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS), T2.STATE, T3.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_VILLAGE_INFRASTRUCTURE T3 ON T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T2.STATE, T3.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
  dg.state, 
  avg(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) as average_monthly_per_capita_consumption, 
  avg(fhc.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs) as average_total_non_food_expenditure
FROM 
  fact_household_consumption fhc
  JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
  JOIN dim_village_infrastructure dvi ON dg.geography_id = dvi.geography_id
WHERE 
  dvi.village_health_facility_available_indicator > 0
GROUP BY 
  dg.state
ORDER BY 
  avg(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
  dg.state, 
  avg(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) as average_monthly_per_capita_consumption, 
  avg(fhc.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs) as average_total_non_food_expenditure
FROM 
  fact_household_consumption fhc
  JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
  JOIN dim_village_infrastructure dvi ON dg.geography_id = dvi.geography_id
WHERE 
  dvi.village_health_facility_available_indicator > 0
GROUP BY 
  dg.state
ORDER BY 
  avg(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) DESC;

question: Top 10 Muslim households dhundho jinka average monthly expenditure sabse zyada hai, khaas taur par woh jinka kharch overall national average se zyada ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T3.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Muslim' GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING AVG(T2.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) > (SELECT AVG(MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION) ORDER BY AVG(T2.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT dh.household_id, AVG(fhc.monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs) AS average_monthly_expenditure
FROM dim_household dh
JOIN fact_household_consumption fhc ON dh.household_id = fhc.household_id
JOIN dim_household_social dhs ON dh.household_id = dhs.household_id
WHERE dhs.caste_religion_group_8_category ILIKE 'Muslim'
GROUP BY dh.household_id
HAVING AVG(fhc.monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs) > (SELECT AVG(monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs) FROM fact_household_consumption)
ORDER BY average_monthly_expenditure DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT dh.household_id, AVG(fhc.monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs) AS average_monthly_expenditure
FROM dim_household dh
JOIN fact_household_consumption fhc ON dh.household_id = fhc.household_id
JOIN dim_household_social dhs ON dh.household_id = dhs.household_id
WHERE dhs.caste_religion_group_8_category ILIKE 'Muslim'
GROUP BY dh.household_id
HAVING AVG(fhc.monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs) > (SELECT AVG(monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs) FROM fact_household_consumption)
ORDER BY average_monthly_expenditure DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: Sare households dhundho jisme kam se kam ek animal care worker ho aur social asset index 27 ka ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_ASSETS_INDEX = '27' AND T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER_OF_ANIMAL_CARE_WORKERS >= '1';
predicted_sql:
SELECT dh.household_id 
FROM dim_household dh 
JOIN dim_household_social dhs ON dh.household_id = dhs.household_id

AND dhs.household_assets_index = 27;

question: 2001 census ke data se, state-wise breakdown dijiye average monthly per capita consumption aur non-food expenses ka, urban aur rural areas ke comparison mein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), AVG(T2.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL ORDER BY T1.STATE ASC

SELECT 
    dh.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural, 
    AVG(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_per_capita_consumption, 
    AVG(fhc.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs) AS average_non_food_expenses

question: Har caste aur religion group ke liye rice, wheat aur pulses ka average combined expenditure kya hai?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, AVG(T1.CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS + T1.CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS + T1.CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM FACT_FOOD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dhs.caste_religion_group_8_category, 
    AVG(ffc.consumption_rice_expenditure_rs + ffc.consumption_wheat_expenditure_rs + ffc.consumption_pulses_expenditure_rs) AS average_combined_expenditure
FROM 
    dim_household_social dhs
JOIN 
    fact_food_consumption ffc ON dhs.household_id = ffc.household_id
GROUP BY 
    dhs.caste_religion_group_8_category
ORDER BY 
    average_combined_expenditure DESC;
